idea-plugin.name: StyleBop
idea-plugin.description:
Open the current CSS or HTML file (or workspace folder) in StyleBop — a visual macOS editor for stylesheets.

Right-click any .css, .html, or .htm file (or a folder) and pick Open in StyleBop. For HTML files, StyleBop edits the inner <style> block (and inline style="…" attributes) as if they were CSS — the surrounding markup round-trips verbatim. The app launches, opens the project, and lands on the construct your cursor was on — a ruleset opens the Rulesets canvas, a @keyframes rule opens the Animations tab, a custom property opens the Tokens tab, and so on.

Requires macOS and a StyleBop install.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.2

  • Recognise .html and .htm files alongside .css. StyleBop edits the inner <style> block (and inline style attributes) as if it were a CSS file.

0.1.1

  • Drop the upper-bound IDE version constraint — the plugin now loads cleanly on every IDE 2024.1+.

0.1.0

  • Initial release. Right-click .css files or folders to open them in StyleBop.
  • Cursor line is forwarded so the smart-router can open the matching visual surface.

action.description: Open this CSS or HTML file (or folder) in StyleBop
